description: Perfect response for a technology topic from prior agent

content.description: A unique fact is: Over 95% of intercontinental internet traffic travels through undersea fibre optic cables — not satellites — with more than 550 active cable systems spanning over 1.4 million kilometres across ocean floors.

metadata.reasoning: Data from TeleGeography's submarine cable map (2024). The 95% figure is widely cited by networking authorities. Cable count approximate and growing.

trajectory.detail: Considered multiple aspects — DNS, BGP, CDNs, physical layer. Physical layer least known.
Selected undersea cables as most people assume satellite-based internet
Verified percentage claim and approximate cable statistics
